name: Renard Leclair - Fox Aristocrat
description:
When a new theater opens in the city of Presbrook, the vulpine aristocrat Renard sets his eyes upon you for the first time and his interest is immediately piqued.

twink fox creatura thing. certain elements aimed with a male user character in mind. female user character ymmv

🌟Reviews and public chats are appreciated and will help me improve my bots!🌟

Art by Tatujapa @ Twitter.
